components.capability: canonical JSON and immutable object identity
components.m25_boundary: Use canonical_json_bytes and immutable collision rules; do not fork hashing.
Wrap connectors behind a common admission adapter; raw/snapshot/derivative remain intake/v1.

components.capability: ACL, owner, licence and audience evidence
components.m25_boundary: Unresolved ACL or licence fails closed and cannot broaden audience.

components.capability: structured blocks, source maps and extraction candidate contracts
components.m25_boundary: Keep exact evidence semantics; M25.3 adds provider adapters without changing candidate authority.
Reuse taxonomy and evidence validation as benchmark compatibility, not as a second resolver.

components.capability: synthesis, reviewer packet and decision contracts
components.m25_boundary: Retain review-only and no-direct-apply invariants; adapt to M25 item ledger.
Generalise source descriptors beyond blogs while preserving evidence-only authority.

components.capability: deterministic batch planning and checkpoint resume
components.m25_boundary: Reuse plan/checkpoint identities and transition semantics through an admission wrapper.
Preserve candidate-only authority, exact spans, secret scan and bounded fields.
Pin exact Foundation ontology and taxonomy; no free-form relation types.
Module pins legacy Source SHA a6ba738d910d01d2ae99b1968f0831989934c549; M25 must pass a verified Source snapshot through a new adapter and benchmark old outcomes before calibration.

components.capability: review packets and Source PR preparation
components.m25_boundary: Module pins legacy Source SHA and stops before GitHub PR creation. Keep packet logic; M25.7 adds stale-decision and exact-head execution gates.
Extend full-population accounting and protected-boundary checks for M25 stages.
Replace fixed three-batch fixture with M25.9 approved 50-100-source population.

components.capability: human decision capture and canonical adoption evidence
components.m25_boundary: Reuse explicit item-level decisions and digest binding; never infer approval.

components.capability: candidate release rebuild and product regression
components.m25_boundary: Use only after authorised Source adoption in M25.8; production pointer remains separate.

components.capability: entry baseline, closure seal and protected mutation model
components.m25_boundary: M25 entry and every stage must preserve exact accepted release identities.
References existing intake/compiler/M21 artifacts; does not duplicate source bytes.
